Key Specification Ducati Monster 796 2011

Engine and Drive Train

Bore88 mm
Stroke66 mm
Engine power87 HP
Rpm at Max. Power8250 rpm
Torque78 Nm
Rpm at Torque6250 rpm
Compression Ratio11
Cylinders2
Valves per cylinder2
ValvesDesmodromic
CoolingAir
Displacement803 ccm

Suspension Front

Front suspensionUpside-Down telescopic fork
BrandShowa

Suspension Rear

Shock absorberMonoshock
BrandShowa

Chassis

FrameSteel
Frame typeTubular

Brakes Front

PistonFour pistons
Technologyradial

Brakes Rear

TypeDisc
PistonDouble piston

Dimensions and Weights

Front tyre width120 mm
Front tyre height70 %
Front tyre diameter17 inch
Rear tyre width180 mm
Rear tyre height55 %
Rear tyre diameter17 inch
Wheelbase1450 mm
Seat Height800 mm
Dry Weight169 kg
License compliancyA

FAQ tires Ducati Monster 796

Which tires are currently recommended by the 1000PS editorial team for this model?

  • Inexpensive sporty all-rounder

    For the daily commute to work and short weekend rides. Sporty tires from the second row - good price/performance ratio.

    • Reifen Satz MICHELIN PILOT POWER 2CT 180/55 ZR17 73W + 120/70 ZR17 58W Motorradreifen Set
      Michelin Pilot Power 3
    • Continental 180/55 ZR17 73W Contiroad
      Continental ContiRoad
    • MITAS 180/55 ZR17 73W TOURING FORCE SP TL
      Mitas Touring Force

  • Hypersport tires with trackday suitability

    Sporty tires for the road that also work well on a track day. Some compromises in the rain on the road or in the heat on the track.

    • MICHELIN POWER CUP 2 180/55ZR17 (73W) - Rückseite Reifen
      Michelin POWER CUP 2

  • Road sport tires

    All-round tire for sporty road riders. Super sports bikes, naked bikes, sports tourers. Also occasional trips to the race track. However, mileage plays a role, as does a short warm-up time and performance in bad weather.

    • Continental 120/70 ZR17 (58W) ContiSportAttack 4 M/C Front Motorradreifen
      Continental ContiSportAttack 4
    • Reifen Satz MICHELIN PILOT POWER 2CT 180/55 ZR17 73W + 120/70 ZR17 58W Motorradreifen Set
      Michelin Power 5
Which tire dimensions do I need?
The tire dimension Ducati Monster 796 2011 is front 120/70-17 and rear 180/55-17.

FAQ Ducati Monster 796

What is the current market price of the Ducati Monster 796?
The current average market price of a Ducati Monster 796, year of manufacture 2012, is 5,890 GBP with an average mileage of 18,385 km.
Which one is better? Ducati Monster 796 or {AlternativeBrandModel}?
You can compare these two motorcycles here. You can find all pros and cons of the comparable model here.
How about the availability of the Ducati Monster 796?
Compared to other Naked bike bikes the availability is normal. There are average number of Ducati Monster 796 bikes available on the market.
How stable is the price of a used Ducati Monster 796? What about the price trend?
Looking at the year of manufacture 2015, the price stability of a Ducati Monster 796 was very good compared to other Naked bike bikes. The price trend was -2% in the first year, +10% in the second year and -19% in the third year.
How popular is the Ducati Monster 796?
There is a strong demand for a Ducati Monster 796 on the market. Test reports of this model are read on average often on the platform of 1000PS.
What is the data source for the content on this page?
The data comes from the online motorcycle magazine '1000PS'. 1000PS was founded in 2001. The company is based in Austria. Most of the content is published in German. However, the team also presents motorcycle test videos in English on YouTube. Here you can find 1000PS on Instagram.
